meta.description: A requirement linked to an epic in a future state specification.

epicId.description: UUID of the Epic this requirement belongs to.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_97723a14_bc20_46ec_bf50_260200f2be8a" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "epic_id" UUID,
    "epic_key" TEXT,
    "acceptance_criteria" TEXT,
    "estimate" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_97723a14_bc20_46ec_bf50_260200f2be8a" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_97723a14bc2046ec_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_97723a14bc2046ec_epic_id" FOREIGN KEY ("epic_id") REFERENCES items(id)
)
